name: Phantom Wallet Agent
description: Wallet-owned agent shell for Phantom-style client signing, local approvals, risk profile display, and receipt-bound paid unlocks.
degenPitch: Phantom owns the signature. DNA x402 owns the receipt trail.
whatItDoes: Requires client-side signature for live intents.
Shows max pain, fee waterfall, and receipt history before paid or live actions.
cursorPrompt: Build a Phantom Wallet Agent with DNA x402. Register public key only, require Phantom/client-side signature for live intents, show max pain and fee waterfall, and reject any server-side wallet secret field.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Phantom Wallet Agent with DNA x402. Register public key only, require Phantom/client-side signature for live intents, show max pain and fee waterfall, and reject any server-side wallet secret field.
exampleFlow: Live intent waits for wallet signature
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt binds wallet public key metadata where needed.
Private key material is never sent.
